description:
A hierarchical diagram illustrating the structure of the High Resolution Layer (HRL) Small Linear Features (SLF) 2021 product suite. The suite is composed of four main categories: Status Layer, Change Layer, Auxiliary Layers, and Reference Data.

The **Status Layer** comprises:
*   Woody Vegetation Layer 5m
*   Small Woody Features 5m (raster)
*   Small Woody Features Vector
*   Street Tree Layer Vector
*   Small Woody Features (SWF) Density 100m (raster)

The **Change Layer** includes:
*   Small Woody Features (SWF) Change

The **Auxiliary Layers** consist of:
*   Parent Scene Identification Layer (PSIL)
*   Woody Vegetation Layer (WVL) Confidence Layer
*   Forest Mask 2021
*   Crop Mask 2021
*   Street Tree Layer (STL) Urban Mask 2021

The **Reference Data** category contains:
*   Training Data
*   Validation Data
